entries.title: Macronutrients
entries.content: Carbohydrates (energy), proteins (building/repair), fats (energy, hormones, cell membranes). Balanced diet includes all three.

entries.title: Immune System Basics
entries.content: White blood cells, antibodies, and lymph nodes defend against pathogens. Vaccines train adaptive immunity without full illness.

entries.title: Sleep and Learning
entries.content: Sleep consolidates memory and clears brain waste. Teens need 8–10 hours; adults 7–9. Poor sleep hurts focus and grades.

entries.title: Hydration
entries.content: Water regulates temperature, transports nutrients, and removes waste. Dehydration causes fatigue and poor concentration.

entries.title: Exercise Benefits
entries.content: Improves cardiovascular health, mood (endorphins), bone density, and cognitive function. WHO recommends 150 min moderate activity/week.
